name: Instant Russian Tea
recipeIngredient: 2 packages lemonade mix, Twist or Wylers
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the ingredients and store in an airtight container.
2. To prepare, add equivalent of 2 teaspoons of the mixture to 1 cup (or more to taste) hot water.
3. LEMONADE MIX: Use the equivalent of 4 packages to make FOUR quarts.
